nav.dataSaved: Your data is saved on this device

login.title: Access your account
login.subtitle: Record purchases and sales even offline.
login.errorMissing: Enter your login or e-mail and password.
login.invalidCheck: Check your details and try again.
login.passwordHint: Tap the eye to hide password

home.pendingSub: You have items not yet sent to the server. Tap Sync.
home.clearText: This action will permanently delete all local records and photos. If they haven't been synced, data will be lost.

form.photosHint: Photos are saved on the device and sent during sync

details.offlineBanner: This record is saved on the device and will be sent automatically when connection returns.
details.errorBanner: The record was saved on the device, but not yet sent to the server.
details.photosNote: Original photos remain available on this device, even offline.

components.emptySub: Create your first purchase or sale record. It will be saved even without internet.
components.syncAllSyncedSub: Online — new records will be synced automatically.
components.syncOfflineSub: You can keep recording — your records are safe on this device and will be sent when connection returns.
components.syncingSub: Sending pending records. You can keep using the app.
components.syncErrorSub: Your data remains saved on this device. Tap to try again.
components.sheetSyncedSub: Your records are updated on the server. Last synchronization just now at
components.sheetErrorSub: Your data remains saved on this device — try again when the connection is stable.
components.sheetSafeNote: Your data is saved on this device until sent.
